About_&_Key_Points:
About
Canara HSBC Life Insurance is an Indian life insurance company, headquartered in Gurugram. In 2008, Canara HSBC Life Insurance  was a JV between Canara Bank (51%), HSBC Insurance (Asia Pacific) Holdings Limited (26%) and PNB (23%). In 2022, the company renamed itself as Canara HSBC Life Insurance after the exit of its third partner, PNB.
[1]
Key Points
Business Profile
[1]
[2]
Canara HSBC Life Insurance Company Limited is a bank-led private life insurer jointly promoted by Canara Bank (51%) and HSBC Insurance. The company offers a comprehensive range of individual and group insurance solutions, including savings, protection, retirement, ULIPs, annuity, and government-backed schemes.
